name: Robert Carvalho
subtitle: Building reliable automation and self-hosted infrastructure
bio: QA Automation Engineer at IBM with 10+ years of experience across IT support, ERP systems, and test automation. I'm passionate about self-hosted infrastructure, running a 3-node Raspberry Pi homelab with 55+ Docker services including monitoring (Prometheus/Grafana), media streaming, and internet radio (AzuraCast).

When not automating tests or tinkering with containers, you'll find me building Telegram bots, managing subscription-based platforms with Mercado Pago PIX, and contributing to open-source. I believe in simplicity — every tool should do one thing well, and every line of code should earn its place.
